name: Jason Yates
subject: So, What Do You Think about Christianity Today’s Editorial?
body:
| | Peter, One week ago, Christianity Today (CT) [published a column](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=HTIUaYWGgtW-Sq8jttULzWLyh6LqOo8JmL_uzhA66Pq9k-l6D_XiIz9kr_OsJ5-9K9KGNp5hJ_vED3Kv6fx8j611lxeipVXv3VCS5UuNMmAAhYv92QOB0Pz1gURF2o6l7bDugUMdJBNKUad2XKs1mA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191226com01&n=1) that sent the Christian community into a frenzy. The publication’s Editor in Chief, Mark Galli, authored an editorial that described the President as “profoundly immoral” and called for his removal from office. Twitter lit up. Counter opinions were swiftly published, including at another publication, [The Christian Post, which took the exact opposite](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=HTIUaYWGgtW-Sq8jttULzX61HryB4MfdillBHImjj_nRSJk76kPNiGmJ0k6KRD4gZA38n4RtB7YbJpkxprf4Wxje6JKxmWkGz9BerVGwDvDAY1oFNPkFBiPBqiXLOQcNrrtbjRGoPkruQAfm-l1gQw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191226com01&n=2) position in its own editorial.. Galli challenged, “Trump’s evangelical supporters” by stating that none of the President’s accomplishments related to religious freedom or protecting the unborn “can balance the moral and political danger we face under a leader” like Trump. Then, he claims that “Mr. Trump should be removed from office by the Senate or by popular vote next election.” Meanwhile, The Christian Post editors didn’t mince words saying that CT’s approach disregarded the President’s policies and insulted the Evangelicals who support; they had embraced a “disdainful, dismissive, elitist posture toward their fellow Christians [that] may well do far more long-term damage to American Christianity and its witness than any current prudential support for President Trump will ever cause.” If that wasn’t enough, [nearly 200 Evangelical leaders issued a letter](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=HTIUaYWGgtW-Sq8jttULzX61HryB4MfdillBHImjj_mRRY12LWAv2owf04JhvLR0Cer_Z9gOOwj8_AfwAMRa9P9q0MF1pmo5L59fNYiyLvuwSygHeQgunQyW7AQKhOkf1w3f8ggDNxh8zv8kscLO4UITH4BearyXbmfLWLbuDHB6fAkQeHJSrhoXsa5nnJ7y&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191226com01&n=3) to Christianity Today condemning the editorial for not only its conclusion about President Trump, but also for targeting and mischaracterizing those Christians who do support the President. The signatories then challenge CT to “tell us who they will support for president among the 2020 field.” And then there was [the perspective of Rev. Franklin Graham](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=oEUgnck4cW6011gcVBs3kYE2Y-zTjN3u4gH8FMUSZEo&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191226com01&n=4), whose father founded Christianity Today. Wherever you stand on the issue, we at My Faith Votes believe that Christians ought to be engaged in the public square. In this case, you could, for instance, tell Christianity Today and/or The Christian Post what you think about their respective editorial positions. You can email CT [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=HTIUaYWGgtW-Sq8jttULzW9KkisBt8uV14S47n-KKIpaZ0CeT_oxYbPeuBdLII5MG5hnubEsqB5VxIve72cFLg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191226com01&n=5) or The Christian Post [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=HTIUaYWGgtW-Sq8jttULzZ9eOSbeEumKfrwMYcyHnrgfOn8YC3EVB0zvngNZOsfc&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191226com01&n=6). Since we are going into a Presidential election, we are likely to see a lot more of this; so, here are a few things we should all agree about, including among the 25-million Evangelicals who are registered to vote but who haven’t voted in several previous presidential elections. **God doesn’t need your vote, but he wants it** Some would argue that God is in control and he doesn’t need your vote to accomplish his purposes in our world. They point to verses such as Daniel 2:21 which tells us that God “deposes kings and raises up others,” and Romans 13:1 which states “the authorities that exist have been established by God.” This argument makes it easy to avoid the whole topic altogether and stay far from the division and difficulties we find in politics. It is true that God doesn’t need your vote, but he calls us to put our faith into action. Unlike the days of Daniel when Kings were appointed, we live in a nation where government leaders are elected. With each election, we have an opportunity to bring the influence of our faith into the voting booth. Galatians 6:10a says, “as we have opportunity, let us do good.” Your vote is an opportunity to do good (or at least to minimize the bad), and God wants us to exercise it. **Your faith can influence more than the Presidential election** All we seem to hear about is the Presidential election. One might conclude that this is the only election happening in 2020, or at least the only election of any significant consequence. Nothing could be further from the truth. In the coming year, Americans will vote to elect 33 Senators, 435 House Representatives, 748 state executives, thousands of state representatives, and tens of thousands of local leaders. In all, Americans will participate in more than 100,000 elections. We should never choose to avoid being involved over conflict over Presidential candidates; if we do then we abdicate our opportunity to vote for all other offices – opportunities to influence our communities in ways that have even greater impact on our daily lives. **You are not alone** Many Christians do not engage in politics and elections because they do not know how to connect the values of their faith to the complex issues we face in our nation and our communities. In a cultural atmosphere that drives people to “pick a side,” Christians sometimes stay on the sidelines if they feel forced to choose a candidate that does not fully align with their values. Others find it too difficult to stay on top of the processes of voting and knowing when elections are happening or who the candidates are. If you find yourself in this position, you are not alone. My Faith Votes was established for you. Our purpose over the next year is to encourage and guide Christians to faithfully engage in every election. When you join with My Faith Votes, you are joining with millions of fellow Christians who intentionally choose to bring the good of their faith to our nation through their vote, My Faith Votes is here to guide you with resources to pray faithfully for our nation and our leaders, to think biblically about the issues, and to vote consistently in every election from the federal level all the way to the local level. At the core of what has transpired over the last week is a spiritual battle raging for the heart and soul of this nation. Satan wants nothing more than to distract us from our public engagement by dividing us and therefore convincing us that our faith has no place in the public square. That is why more than 25 million Christians did not vote in 2016, and we cannot let this happen again. Join us and get equipped for 2020 by joining us at [www.myfaithvotes.org](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y80vKkf9-dYSQkXl84cjiKYSGryi6lRPALD1Ju3k2-ew&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191226com01&n=7). Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191226com01&n=8)
---

Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191226com01&n=10) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191226com01&n=11) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191226com01&n=12)

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I hate to tell you this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- I'll make this quick. We're about to close the books on the first full quarter of our campaign and will have to report not just how much we have raised, but how many folks have stepped up to chip in so far. **Everyone, from the media pundits to our Republican opponent 's right-wing billionaire backers, will obsessively pour over this report to determine whether or not we're in a strong position to win. ** Any sign of weakness could invite McConnell's dark money network to ramp up their attacks on our campaign, and we cannot let that happen. Right now, we're behind on our $500,000 year-end fundraising goal. But I am convinced we can catch up if folks like you step up before our report goes public in just a few days. That's why I'm asking: [**Will you make a contribution of $10 (or more!) before our critical FEC fundraising deadline? I 'm not taking any money from corporate PACs -- so the only way we can hit this goal is if you chip in:**](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191226-eoy?refcode=em-191226-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191226-eoy?refcode=em-191226-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") I am very proud of the campaign we're running. It's full of so much life, passion, and courage -- and we're ready to win this thing. When we file our report to the FEC, I want everyone to see that energy, too. I hope I can count on you to step up today. Thanks in advance! -- John | [DONATE TODAY](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191226-eoy?refcode=em-191226-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---

---

[Unsubscribe here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637715d0/691c9bd/6f4dbb6f/11a73b16/3064451862/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: polling@dga.net
subject: impeachment (your response is urgently needed)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
Team, Republicans continue to defend Donald Trump's every action, no matter how hateful or disgraceful. They're doing everything in their power to confuse and deceive the American people to keep the president in office.

**Last week, Trump became the third president in our nation 's history to be impeached. But not a single Republican voted for impeachment - despite the evidence of abuse of power and obstruction of Congress!**
With so much false information out there, we wanted to reach out directly to Democrats like you, Team, to get your opinion on impeachment. Please, tell us what you think of Trump's conduct:
| | [Trump did nothing wrong](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MTY3NjYzNTYS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTc1NjI2OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| | [Trump's conduct was bad, but he should not be removed ](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTY3NjYzNTYS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTc1NjI2OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| | [Trump should be removed](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTY3NjYzNTYS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTc1NjI2OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Thank you for your input.

The DGA team

name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: re: our performance in Iowa (and a free sticker)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We're less than 40 days from the Iowa Caucus -- which is going to be a huge test for our campaign. It's the first electoral contest of the primary, and we've got to make sure that we come out strong. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bea6/45c30650/114c54529/66fa948a/1533841387/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
We're less than 40 days from the Iowa Caucus -- which is going to be a huge test for our campaign. It's the first electoral contest of the primary, and we've got to make sure that we come out strong.

**And whether or not we hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal will directly impact how much we can invest directly into Iowa and other states in the final weeks before voting and caucusing starts. And right now we've been pacing behind our goal.**

**[There's still time to turn things around, but we need a strong response today. Can you please make your first donation right now? >
This is our most important fundraising deadline yet, for a couple of reasons:

* Our public fundraising report released after this end-of-quarter fundraising deadline will be used as a measure of our movement's strength. Reporters, pundits, other campaigns, and caucus-goers will use these numbers to determine how much support our campaign has across the country.

* We need enough resources to kick things into high gear and run the strongest campaign possible in the last weeks before the Iowa Caucuses. We need to connect with as many people as possible -- though advertising, outreach, and organizing -- and we rely on grassroots donations to make those investments.

**The only way we'll hit this goal is if supporters like you make their first donation before this important deadline.**

**[Will you chip in for the first time to help make sure our fundraising numbers are as strong as possible before the Iowa Caucuses?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bea6/45c30650/114c54529/66fa948d/1533841387/VEsEDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnItc3RpY2tlci1lb3EiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTFKRl9FT1FfR09MX0NfMjAxOTEyMjZfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr-sticker-eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM1JF_EOQ_GOL_C_20191226_V1S1_P")**

Team Warren

name: Booker HQ
subject: Here's where the money will go:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
We can't win this election without a grassroots army of small-dollar donors powering this campaign.
| | |
---
| Team, We know we've already emailed you a few times about our $800,000 end-of-year fundraising goal. If you haven't donated yet (please do!), [_**you can by clicking here.**_](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191226_BHQ_20191226-fr-BHQ-whereitgoes-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Now let us explain what hitting this critical goal will allow us to accomplish. Here's where the money will go:
* **Funding advertising -- TV, radio, and digital ads -- to reach voters and caucus-goers.** Thanks to the amount we raised this month, we were able to go live with our first TV ad. But airtime is expensive. It'll require a few hundred thousand more dollars to keep hitting the airwaves with Cory's message.
* **Executing our get-out-the-vote and get-out-the-caucus pushes in the early states.** It takes a lot of resources (staff, volunteers, supplies) to persuade eligible voters to turn out and support Cory in their state's primary or caucus.
* **Hiring staff and scaling up in the later states.** The path to the Democratic nomination is a long one. It may start in the first four early states (which are very important), but we're going to need to compete in the states that vote on Super Tuesday and beyond.

**We 're going to need to do all three of these things on our path to victory. If you donate right now, it would go a long way towards helping us achieve these objectives.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191226_BHQ_20191226-fr-BHQ-whereitgoes-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c9e/5fca0d19/7bd51d7c/291cf608/320921870/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c9e/5fca0d19/7bd51d7c/291cf617/320921870/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c9e/5fca0d19/7bd51d7c/291cf616/320921870/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c9e/5fca0d19/7bd51d7c/291cf615/320921870/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c9e/5fca0d19/7bd51d7c/291cf609/320921870/VEsHAQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5172%2E377263%2EsL1T7r) Yang Gang --

We’re putting together our calculations (shocker: we love MATH here at HQ) on how to hit our end-of-quarter goal by December 31st.

We're looking at how many donors we need, what they need to contribute, and how to close the remaining $2,036,222 gap.

Here’s what we have in our records for you this week since we launched our goal: **End-of-Quarter Goal Supporter Record**

**Name:** Unlisted
**Yang Supporter:** Yes
**Contribution Toward Goal:** $0
**Suggested Contribution:** $10

| [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20541?t=5&akid=5172%2E377263%2EsL1T7r)
---
We need your help before the deadline if we’re going to close this gap. **[Can you make your first contribution toward this goal?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20541?t=6&akid=5172%2E377263%2EsL1T7r)**

Thank you for everything,

Team Yang

Here’s what we have in our records for you this week since we launched our goal: End-of-Quarter Goal Supporter Record Name: Unlisted Yang Supporter: Yes Contribution Toward Goal: $0 Suggested Contribution: $10 | We need your help before the deadline if we’re going to close this gap. | Team, Michael sent you a crucial fundraising update this morning.

Some pundits may be trying to count Michael out, but we've proved them wrong before and we're going to do it again. But we need your help.

Our fundraising deadline has never been more important. We need to raise $700,000 to launch our paid media and organizing program in New Hampshire and right now, we're falling short. Team -

I'm reaching out to you to ask you to make your first donation today. [You can chip in right here >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba88e/134673f2/9763bf5/69979115/2016684940/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_122619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I want to take a moment to tell you why any amount you donate is so important.

We've planted our flag in New Hampshire where an unprecedented 67% of primary voters are undecided or open to changing their minds.

[That's why we're planning to launch an aggressive paid media and organizing program to get our message out to every voter. To do that, we must raise $700,000, and we can't do it without grassroots supporters like you.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba88e/134673f2/9763bf5/69979115/2016684940/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_122619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

As a Senator from Colorado -- a purple swing state -- I've never known an easy election.

Only 3% of Coloradans knew me when I started my first Senate campaign.

Against impossible odds, I went on to beat a Tea Party Republican in a terrible year for Democrats.

Six years later, I did it again.

[We proved them wrong before, and we'll do it again.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba88e/134673f2/9763bf5/69979115/2016684940/VEsHAA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_122619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Kris Murphy
subject: no justice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
GOP Senators have already decided how they are going to vote on Trump's removal from office. They've decided BEFORE the trial. They've decided they don't care about proof or process. They've decided partisan loyalty is more important than patriotism.
Imagine a criminal facing serious charges showing up to a trial where the jury has already committed to finding them not guilty. There is no justice here - only corruption.
Will you help us in our efforts to defend the constitution and fight for an America free from the clutches of tyranny?
https://secure.ngpvan.com/GJw4NZFDOUaWw74BKdbsOA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GJw4NZFDOUaWw74BKdbsOA2]

--
Kris Murphy
Executive Director, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Genevieve Collins
subject: Will you help set us up for 2020?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Texas, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nKgJmbjwVYs8ixYxfDi22yRhdNt5GE6GW7MFq3HBUssIT_WvG_QlCydGDLb5WTo4oE-zRcbAZDXhHffaxyYn2lKT6uWJgSZ6_hm7LE_0ddbrGQrYeJpLI_G1JWMzl4-3vzVkxcUqfpxY77Qi8NMTlhLeQE36bzJgoSdvWqrx5i0-c8Q1UcXqsgc4eFRacQl2DYkv4BqG90zaLPGS_KS95cxYc7GNpY6Q5FtlPxW-MOY8HEG1pc0vWlP_3KXkdWv9&c=-A-qr-eVNvz4ASDpVAG4UUSw642B6JjhIWR6EOzC5CK2-xhOXeveDw==&ch=BweItVzOod2wwN-Wppmw_NLjZRravlhGDH8JtTZVmr2IRvar8HqaxA==)
---
| Peter,
It's no secret that Democrats are out of control in this country. As we return from the holiday break, headlines continue to remind us that we are still in a fight for our nation's future.
Yet even as we face the very real threat of socialism and the Democrat's weekly sensationalized headline, I'm optimistic.
[2020 could be one of the best years in our nation's history and we have the chance to make it happen.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nKgJmbjwVYs8ixYxfDi22yRhdNt5GE6GW7MFq3HBUssIT_WvG_QlCydGDLb5WTo4oE-zRcbAZDXhHffaxyYn2lKT6uWJgSZ6_hm7LE_0ddbrGQrYeJpLI_G1JWMzl4-3vzVkxcUqfpxY77Qi8NMTlhLeQE36bzJgoSdvWqrx5i0-c8Q1UcXqsgc4eFRacQl2DYkv4BqG90zaLPGS_KS95cxYc7GNpY6Q5FtlPxW-MOY8HEG1pc0vWlP_3KXkdWv9&c=-A-qr-eVNvz4ASDpVAG4UUSw642B6JjhIWR6EOzC5CK2-xhOXeveDw==&ch=BweItVzOod2wwN-Wppmw_NLjZRravlhGDH8JtTZVmr2IRvar8HqaxA==)
2020 could be the year we send effective leadership to DC, take a stand for the free market and conservative values, and flip our district back to red, as it should be.
Will you help me make that happen by covering the cost of much-needed campaign items? If all of us who want to see change put our money where our mouth is, we could get this country back on track!
---

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter, It's no secret that Democrats are out of control in this country. As we return from the holiday break, headlines continue to remind us that we are still in a fight for our nation's future. Yet even as we face the very real threat of socialism and the Democrat's weekly sensationalized headline, I'm optimistic. == 2020 could be the year we send effective leadership to DC, take a stand for the free market and conservative values, and flip our district back to red, as it should be. Will you help me make that happen by covering the cost of much-needed campaign items? body:
Who do you think is better - President Trump or Obama? |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4fcfd5a0efb475471e0c43c19f9ecd7129a0fc26f43ce548a87b9da1a9dc50bc4bb882abcc7f228e58f7db99409256636afac61d7ec3d369)
---
Friend,

It's no secret that Barack H. Obama's presidency was a disaster.

In addition to implementing multiple **UNCONSTITUTIONAL** policies, making bad deal after bad deal with foreign nations, and destroying our economy, _he used the FBI to SPY on President Trump 's 2016 Campaign_ \- **HE 'S A TOTAL DISGRACE!**

President Trump hasn't even finished his first term yet and look at what he has already accomplished:
* **Over SEVEN MILLION JOBS have been created**
* **Unemployment is at 3.5% - a 50-year low**
* **Americans are keeping MORE of their money thanks to HISTORIC tax cuts**
* **America is finally respected on the World Stage again**
* **The WALL is being FINISHED to secure our Southern Border**

---
| We've given you the facts, and now we want to know what YOU think.

---
**[Please take our Official Trump vs. Obama Poll and let us know who you think is the better President.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4fcfd5a0efb475477ef01916c37d47f0cb4d2a492c91fa0aa9fc1269e35a24cbf4f36e321ca215eded75bb6f218f1bfc12fc0af7ee9bcf5a)**

Obama said we couldn't do it, the Never Trumpers said we couldn't do it, the Fake News media said we couldn't do it. But, President Trump has never cared what _THEY_ think about him. He's only ever cared what _YOU_ think about him.

We're sending President Trump the results **TOMORROW** of every Patriot who took our poll, and we want your response to be one of the first he sees.

**[Please take our Official Trump vs Obama Poll and let us know who you think is the better President.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4fcfd5a0efb4754764eb88b3828626c3b0e4358493685e98c364662e82ceb36d76383796dec536a8bd31efa26e127924b9d9f5f4c4e13970)**

Thank you,

Team Trump 2020

My team and I just met, to finalize our plans for the New Year. It's time to kick this campaign into overdrive and slam the gas pedal to the floor.

After this impeachment fraud, I’m more determined than ever to DEFEAT the failed career politicians in the Republican primary and then DEFEAT liberal Doug Jones!

subject: FEC Filing Deadline 12/31 — Show Your Support!
body:

| Dear Patriot,
As you may know, the final quarter of fundraising for 2019 is coming to an end, and the FEC Deadline is December 31st. This is an opportunity to show that I am the only Republican for the job and that I will defeat Rep. Susan Wild in 2020 and help Republicans take back the House. Fellow Patriot, I need your help on this matter, and we do not have much time before the deadline. Unlike Rep. Susan Wild, I rely on small-dollar donations from grassroots supporters like yourself to keep my campaign moving forward.
[That is why a donation of $100, $50, or even just $25 would go a long way in winning this election.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sxcczY9ewhHdSaTsLzBXlZeggUalTFFEJgjF_aMT8z4XGVIo7nLmjCSLOt-XQlSjIZysde_ppocrVdOQSJXuQzsin40ZPXIviA2vhVQZy0lhdT8Zoa7kzKXwNt3-prw93gY9OFDNHBAaIoJ1-6ZVS0rewcnUg-ael1xgvrYDlzh5vpwEpXqMIg==&c=bJQ2KL5h6L23DGfop_G170hOXH7YASTQ-wB6YVyfxBq1GLXMi_G0HQ==&ch=XVDKyn4f8xwvk1HzCiwT4cpeXKWwrQ-TGWXPHz21_olXzQUFAhr7cw==)

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Will I see you tomorrow?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Tomorrow my campaign is closing the books on 2019 with one of our most unique fundraising events yet -- a Fiesta Bowl Parade watch party in Phoenix!

**My campaign has organized our event right along the main parade route at 2 West Marshall Avenue, which will be prime for viewing the parade for everyone in your family.**

**[We need to know if we need to get more supplies ahead of tomorrow's event, so please RSVP if you will be joining us >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/c7poLB1Tf6JCyb8jPOVYxQZE4uvM_4TM57Q_y0kjPRw=/U-VeH7Wb0tEq4ME8B2XoR7qU09dVZry3vmqPYAeE0sM=)**

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/c7poLB1Tf6JCyb8jPOVYxQZE4uvM_4TM57Q_y0kjPRw=/U-VeH7Wb0tEq4ME8B2XoR7qU09dVZry3vmqPYAeE0sM=)

**[If you can't make it out to the parade tomorrow, you can still donate here >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/c7poLB1Tf6JCyb8jPOVYxQZE4uvM_4TM57Q_y0kjPRw=/8B40KNq-NDfaRUzNucU_Zw1Afj5Bnyvu_ZgJ04AdDsw=?refcode=X_122719_Invite_FiestaBowlParade_B&amount=25&recurring=auto)**

I look forward to hopefully seeing you tomorrow!

\-- _Greg_

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: in just 5 days...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Our polling has this race as a “toss up” and I know that if we get the resources, we will win this election in 2020 and restore what’s historically been New York City’s only Republican voice in Washington.
| | | | 5 days from now our end of year fundraising deadline hits.

Our polling has this race as a "toss up" and I know that if we get the resources, we will win this election in 2020 and restore what’s historically been New York City’s only Republican voice in Washington. With elected officials like Bill de Blasio, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Jerry Nadler controlling the agenda, it’s more important now than ever that we take back this seat next year and have a strong voice of opposition to push back.

We're only $9,400 away from the crucial goal we need to hit before the ball drops on New Year's.

If you haven’t already done so, please chip in. If you have already given, please consider matching your contribution.

**[NicoleMalliotakis.com/donate](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=70A85A1A973)

Thank you so much for helping us reach our 2019 goal!

Sincerely,
Nicole

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: Can I have a moment to explain, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
On December 31st, our campaign is facing a critical FEC fundraising deadline. You might remember from September that these FEC deadlines are a pretty big deal.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13293195/137880547/480453248?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.27_b1_ed_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2JhNjUzYS1jYTI4LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mk1xwCmiCnQDv0XVp1WfUu564lWNVsskA0RJ1kq6_os=) Team,

On December 31st, our campaign is facing a critical FEC fundraising deadline. You might remember from September that these FEC deadlines are a pretty big deal. After these reports are filed, they become public information.

Since nonpartisan election forecasters at outlets like the _Washington Post_ , _Roll Call_ , and _Cook Political Report_ call this race one of the top ten most competitive House elections in the country, all eyes will be on our report to judge the viability of this campaign.

**Last quarter, we outraised Scott Perry by almost $60,000.** This quarter, we need to show that our campaign is even stronger and ready to build on the momentum as we approach the election in the new year.

name: Stephanie Schmid
subject: Time to get back into it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
After a few big meals, and some much needed rest...
|
---

| | Friends \-- It was great to put away work, relax, and spend time with family over Christmas. After a few big meals and some much needed rest, it is time to get back to work and push to the end of the year. We set an ambitious online fundraising goal for the end of the quarter. With only 5 days to go, we still need to raise $3,010. **That is just $602 a day from now until 2020.[Can I count on a quick donation from you before our fundraising deadline?](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff09a/522d4087/7affe850/4f3413d8/881493971/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191227_em_fr_eoq1_l1&amount=39")** | **[CONTRIBUTE $39 NOW](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff09a/522d4087/7affe850/4f3413d7/881493971/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191227_em_fr_eoq1_btn1&amount=39")**
---
We cannot allow Chris Smith to win again, team. He has been in Washington for 39 years -- since the year that I was born.
[**You can help make 2020 his last in year office by chipping in to our end-of-year fundraising drive:**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff09a/522d4087/7affe850/4f3413d6/881493971/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191227_em_fr_eoq1_l2&amount=39")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: The storm I won’t ever forget
body:
Peter,
As we approach the 2020 elections, I’ve thought about an important guidepost brought to my attention in 1997 in a way I will never forget. I thought you would appreciate it.
Arkansas was struck that year by a devastating tornado. As Governor, I was visiting one of the worst-hit towns when State Rep. Martha Shoffner said she had to show me something. She took me to a courthouse whose roof was completely gone. Inside was a museum in which everything had been blown away or destroyed...except for one thing.
Still hanging on the wall was my official Governor's photo. It hadn’t broken or fallen off. It wasn't even askew. I took it as a sobering reminder that no matter what disaster might befall our state, it was the Governor’s responsibility to remain steady as a rock and see everyone through.
**As we approach what will likely be the most polarizing and important election season of our lifetime, I feel more impressed now than ever before that it is the responsibility of Christians to see everyone through.**
The attacks against the unborn have never been more intense. The efforts to redefine what God established - gender, marriage, and family - have risen to new levels of extremism that threaten the very foundation of our society. And your freedom to live out your faith in your place of business and in your community is under an all out assault from the secular left.
These are the makings of a perfect storm threatening our biblical values.
**[We need your help now to close our budget gap and mobilize believers to vote in 2020. Our goal is to raise $223,000 before January 1](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191227apl01nd&n=1).**
This will help fuel our 2020 national media campaign, church initiative, and Christian college outreach strategy. And the exciting news is that your gift will be MATCHED dollar for dollar, thanks to a generous matching grant, but it must be in before the end of the year!
**[Will you prayerfully consider making a year-end contribution to My Faith Votes](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191227apl01nd&n=2)?**
As I reflected years ago on the devastating tornado in Arkansas, the thought occurred to me that we can't stop the storms, and we can’t hide from them. All we can do is be prepared with a strong enough foundation so that we can ride them out and help lead others through it.
Be part of the solution with us - to lead our country through these challenging times - for the sake of our biblical values. The action we take today has never been more important.
[Donate Today to DOUBLE Your Gift](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191227apl01nd&n=3)
---

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman

clean_body: Peter, As we approach the 2020 elections, I’ve thought about an important guidepost brought to my attention in 1997 in a way I will never forget. I thought you would appreciate it. Arkansas was struck that year by a devastating tornado. As Governor, I was visiting one of the worst-hit towns when State Rep. Martha Shoffner said she had to show me something. She took me to a courthouse whose roof was completely gone. Inside was a museum in which everything had been blown away or destroyed...except for one thing. Still hanging on the wall was my official Governor's photo. It hadn’t broken or fallen off. It wasn't even askew. I took it as a sobering reminder that no matter what disaster might befall our state, it was the Governor’s responsibility to remain steady as a rock and see everyone through. As we approach what will likely be the most polarizing and important election season of our lifetime, I feel more impressed now than ever before that it is the responsibility of Christians to see everyone through. The attacks against the unborn have never been more intense. The efforts to redefine what God established - gender, marriage, and family - have risen to new levels of extremism that threaten the very foundation of our society. And your freedom to live out your faith in your place of business and in your community is under an all out assault from the secular left. These are the makings of a perfect storm threatening our biblical values. . This will help fuel our 2020 national media campaign, church initiative, and Christian college outreach strategy. And the exciting news is that your gift will be MATCHED dollar for dollar, thanks to a generous matching grant, but it must be in before the end of the year! ? As I reflected years ago on the devastating tornado in Arkansas, the thought occurred to me that we can't stop the storms, and we can’t hide from them. All we can do is be prepared with a strong enough foundation so that we can ride them out and help lead others through it. Be part of the solution with us - to lead our country through these challenging times - for the sake of our biblical values. The action we take today has never been more important. United. We Stand. Gov. Mike Huckabee Honorary National Chairman ©2019 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

\-- MJ

body:
If the numbers don't pick up, we run the risk of having to pull back plans to organize for Elizabeth Warren in all 50 states during the primary. And that plan is central to her path to victory. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852becf/45c30650/114a299c6/66fa9b3e/365864923/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

In this email, we're going to do something different -- something a little risky.

Traditionally, campaigns wait until after the mandatory FEC reporting deadlines to announce how much they've raised. But this isn't a traditional campaign. We're a grassroots team, and you should know exactly where things stand right now -- and exactly why it's important that you give.

So far this quarter, **we 've raised a little over $17 million**. That's a good chunk behind where we were at this time last quarter.

The good news? We have until midnight on December 31 to get things going.

**So Elizabeth Warren needs your help. Right now. The goal is $20 million for the quarter -- that's how much the campaign needs to keep our plans on track.**

**[Please chip in $2 or whatever you can to help close the fundraising gap and continue building our ground game at the most critical point before the primaries and caucuses start.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852becf/45c30650/114a299c6/66fa9b23/365864923/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTFORl9FT1FfR09MX0NfMjAxOTEyMjdfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM1NF_EOQ_GOL_C_20191227_V1S1_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
Now, we don't have to match what we raised last quarter -- and we probably won't.

But if the numbers don't pick up, we run the risk of having to pull back plans to organize for Elizabeth Warren in all 50 states during the primary. And that plan is central to her path to victory.

By setting this goal and revealing to our opponents where we are, we give up some strategic advantage.

That's how important it is to close this gap.

This campaign belongs to you, and you're in the driver's seat for what happens now.

The billionaires in wine caves are ready to clink glasses and celebrate because they're confident that having more money than you means they'll be able to drown out your voice in this process to choose the Democratic nominee.

Asking supporters like you to chip in is the only way we're going to try to catch up on fundraising. There are no wealthy donors in high-rise penthouses or outside super PACs coming to the rescue.

Just you, and thousands of other supporters like you, digging deep to pitch in what they can to do this.

Elizabeth is proud that we're running a 100% grassroots-funded campaign. She wouldn't have it any other way.

But if there were ever a time for every grassroots supporter to step up, it's now.

**[Please contribute $2 or whatever you can to help close this fundraising gap.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852becf/45c30650/114a299c6/66fa9b23/365864923/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTFORl9FT1FfR09MX0NfMjAxOTEyMjdfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM1NF_EOQ_GOL_C_20191227_V1S1_P")**

Thanks,

Team Warren

By setting this goal and revealing to our opponents where we are, we give up some strategic advantage. That's how important it is to close this gap. This campaign belongs to you, and you're in the driver's seat for what happens now. The billionaires in wine caves are ready to clink glasses and celebrate because they're confident that having more money than you means they'll be able to drown out your voice in this process to choose the Democratic nominee. Asking supporters like you to chip in is the only way we're going to try to catch up on fundraising. There are no wealthy donors in high-rise penthouses or outside super PACs coming to the rescue. Just you, and thousands of other supporters like you, digging deep to pitch in what they can to do this. Elizabeth is proud that we're running a 100% grassroots-funded campaign. She wouldn't have it any other way. But if there were ever a time for every grassroots supporter to step up, it's now. "" Thanks, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Hope Walz
subject: what a year...
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| Hi there, This has been a year of new beginnings for me and my family. My dad was sworn in as Governor. I started school at the University of Minnesota. And we adopted our puppy, Scout! Through it all, I can't emphasize enough how much it has meant to me knowing that you and the entire One Minnesota team have been here to have my dad's back. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/OveFzRx4Gx1jAnqu1uOy40nsrvCjqiqdrZ518Bf-gng=/RzJ2uoUTYyJ6j86gh41lvs4YQQdVqupmI_CXrBPcYsg=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
Hi there,
This has been a year of new beginnings for me and my family. My dad was sworn in as Governor. I started school at the University of Minnesota. And we adopted our puppy, Scout!
Through it all, I can't emphasize enough how much it has meant to me knowing that you and the entire One Minnesota team have been here to have my dad's back.
Every time I'm feeling discouraged by the negativity and chaos in Washington, I think about this movement and how much we've been able to accomplish together, focusing on our strength in unity. It gives me hope.
That's why I'm reaching out today. My dad's 2019 fundraising numbers will be made public for the _first time_ shortly after the New Year. It's a huge opportunity to prove that our campaign for One Minnesota is stronger than ever, right as we kick-off 2020.
**Please, help my dad send the message that the politics of fear and division will never prevail in Minnesota, no matter how hard President Trump tries to flip us red.[Make a contribution of $5 or more towards our $20,000 end-of-year grassroots goal today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/OveFzRx4Gx1jAnqu1uOy40nsrvCjqiqdrZ518Bf-gng=/RzJ2uoUTYyJ6j86gh41lvs4YQQdVqupmI_CXrBPcYsg=?refcode=body&amount=25)**

name: Kimberley Boggus
subject: now's the time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
I'm Kimberley Mike's new campaign manager and I hope I could get a moment with you.
|
---
| |
---

| | I hope you had a relaxing holiday, team. I'm Kimberley, Mike's new campaign manager and I hope I could get a moment with you. It's time to get back to work, because it's just four short days until 2020 and it is time to make the big push. **We need to raise $17,582 before midnight on Tuesday to hit the yearly goal I set for this campaign.[Can you help us out with a donation of any size?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2439/33365068/4a612e58/3f8b99d2/2419356877/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191227_em_fr_all_eoylaunch_L1&amount=10")** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | [**$10**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2439/33365068/4a612e58/3f8b99d3/2419356877/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191227_em_fr_all_eoylaunch_abx1&amount=10&express_lane=true") | **[$25](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2439/33365068/4a612e58/3f8b99ec/2419356877/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191227_em_fr_all_eoylaunch_abx2&amount=25&express_lane=true")** | **[$50](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2439/33365068/4a612e58/3f8b99ed/2419356877/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191227_em_fr_all_eoylaunch_abx3&amount=50&express_lane=true")**
---|---|---
**[$100](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2439/33365068/4a612e58/3f8b99ee/2419356877/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191227_em_fr_all_eoylaunch_abx4&amount=100&express_lane=true")** | **[$250](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2439/33365068/4a612e58/3f8b99ef/2419356877/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191227_em_fr_all_eoylaunch_abx5&amount=250&express_lane=true")** | **[Other](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2439/33365068/4a612e58/3f8b99e8/2419356877/VEsB/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191227_em_fr_all_eoylaunch_abx6&amount=15")**
This might be the most crucial goal of the election cycle. If we don't have the resources to run a strong campaign starting in the new year, our chances of winning in November drop drastically -- and with it goes the likelihood of a Democratic majority in the Senate.
We need Mike in the Senate, it's that simple. He has a proven track-record of honest, moral leadership -- something that Washington needs badly.
**But the only way we can elect him -- and yes, it is up to us, team -- is by first hitting this end-of-year goal.[Can you chip in right now?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2439/33365068/4a612e58/3f8b99e9/2419356877/VEsO/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191227_em_fr_all_eoylaunch_L2&amount=15")**

Democratically yours,
Kimberley Boggus

name: Sara Gideon
subject: You deserve an explanation
body:
Here is the truth:
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e08/4bef7a87/6a31cfb3/287f94e1/681521763/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
No doubt about it, our campaign sends a good number of fundraising emails. So I thought it was important to ask for a moment of your time to explain why these messages, especially before this critical FEC deadline, are so important to our campaign and our chances to defeat Susan Collins.
Here is the truth:
This campaign will not be easy. We are not just taking on Susan Collins in this race. She has Donald Trump behind her and the full force of Mitch McConnell's political operation as well. She has stood with them and they are eager to return the favor.
That means she is going to raise extraordinary sums of money, mostly from large contributions from the wealthy and well-connected.
Our campaign raises money differently. For us, the overwhelming majority of donations we receive come from people like you giving small amounts -- most coming in response to emails like this one. I am very proud of that fact, and you should be too.
And when this deadline ends, we're going to report our numbers and make that difference clear. But that means we have to ask:
**[Can I count on you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign before our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year comes to a close? I would not ask if it were not so important.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e08/4bef7a87/6a31cfb3/287f94e0/681521763/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjctMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191227-1-full")**
I want to thank you for the tremendous outpouring of support for our campaign since we launched. I wasn't sure what to expect when I decided to run, but your response has powered this campaign. I couldn't do it without you -- no one could -- so thank you.
Let's keep going.
Sara Gideon
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e08/4bef7a87/6a31cfb3/287f94e0/681521763/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjctMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191227-1-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e08/4bef7a87/6a31cfb3/287f94e7/681521763/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e08/4bef7a87/6a31cfb3/287f94e6/681521763/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e08/4bef7a87/6a31cfb3/287f94e5/681521763/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Claire Chase
subject: 25% of the Federal Judiciary Is A Trump Appointee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CLAIRE CHASE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friend,
President Trump has reshaped the federal judiciary for decades to come and America is going to be better off for it.
Since President Trump's inauguration, there have been 187 judges appointed. Including Roswell's own Kea Riggs and Joel Carson. Each of whom are proudly serving our country and representing New Mexico values from the bench.
---
| | | [Keep the Court Conservative](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018wqmnYR8k2QGUYw_aJUPm8SYEfKtXwvg7ZCT9Ll8TYVki9SUEGyXo682pyiUw9jQ893ILY-K-pYilL3Qm1OpkcCxrfYNSKg4OkLkkP1uzByc7RcmJIJJyiwduJYqIWH1Ms_hwTldBFVj2ec18zcafO9_ZwAq9JDcUgJf_bePOAUGmCoNfkGY-EVNxHKdEq2I&c=eiMU4OWO5HdcwHOlH5LCXGAofP2w4XKbrd0Dw_Sg9G7Eu0zQiUYFkQ==&ch=fOUooGNsIXF3Vm4s1Gin3nUhB5ijkpd9O1QnZT-irY_O2fbqyE3QIw==)
---
| The federal judiciary is now made up of 25% Trump appointees, thanks to Senator Mitch McConnell's leadership in the Senate and President Trump's conservative vision for America.
[Donate today if you agree with the direction America is heading!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018wqmnYR8k2QGUYw_aJUPm8SYEfKtXwvg7ZCT9Ll8TYVki9SUEGyXo682pyiUw9jQ893ILY-K-pYilL3Qm1OpkcCxrfYNSKg4OkLkkP1uzByc7RcmJIJJyiwduJYqIWH1Ms_hwTldBFVj2ec18zcafO9_ZwAq9JDcUgJf_bePOAUGmCoNfkGY-EVNxHKdEq2I&c=eiMU4OWO5HdcwHOlH5LCXGAofP2w4XKbrd0Dw_Sg9G7Eu0zQiUYFkQ==&ch=fOUooGNsIXF3Vm4s1Gin3nUhB5ijkpd9O1QnZT-irY_O2fbqyE3QIw==)
These are exciting times for not only New Mexico, but for the country as well, and I hope you join me to keep this momentum going.
You have the power to make this happen!

name: Eric Ming
subject: Andrew told us he’s willing to do whatever it takes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5173%2E377263%2EMCfFa9) Yang Gang --

The morning the debate thresholds were announced, Andrew told us he’s willing to do whatever it takes in terms of travel, events, and interviews over the next two weeks to qualify for the next debate.

Now, we’re asking you for the same.

**We set the biggest fundraising goal in the history of this campaign to fund our plan over the next two weeks to hit the polling thresholds for the next debate. It will be tough, but if all of us match Andrew’s commitment, I know we can do it.**

[Can you pitch in $10 so we can hit this goal for Andrew and make sure he’s on that January debate stage? We have less than five days until our deadline on December 31st. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20546?t=5&akid=5173%2E377263%2EMCfFa9) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20546?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=5173%2E377263%2EMCfFa9)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20546?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=5173%2E377263%2EMCfFa9)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20546?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=5173%2E377263%2EMCfFa9)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20546?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=5173%2E377263%2EMCfFa9)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20546?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=5173%2E377263%2EMCfFa9)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20546?t=11&amount=25&akid=5173%2E377263%2EMCfFa9)
---
This is one of those “challenge accepted” moments. Let’s show everyone how powerful this movement we’re building truly is.

Eric Ming
Director of Online Fundraising and Paid Media
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20546?t=12&akid=5173%2E377263%2EMCfFa9)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=5173%2E377263%2EMCfFa9) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5173%2E377263%2EMCfFa9) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Nikki Foster
subject: Our biggest deadline yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732ceda/30a4f917/50989d3d/28ce8fdf/4072186396/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191227_EOQ5_U3_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191227_EOQ5_U3_X1")

| | We have to announce our fundraising numbers soon -- and I wanted to share with you what happens if we fail to hit our goal: We can't afford to fully fund voter outreach, and could lose our early momentum to unseat Steve Chabot, Republicans who have attacked me as a "socialist loser" in the past will see that we're vulnerable and launch worse attacks -- and we won't have the resources to respond, and Steve Chabot will get the message that he is getting away with his corruption. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - We have to announce our fundraising numbers soon -- **and I wanted to share with you what happens if we fail to hit our goal:**
* **We can 't afford to fully fund voter outreach**, and could lose our early momentum to unseat Steve Chabot
* Republicans who have attacked me as a "socialist loser" in the past will see that we're vulnerable and launch worse attacks -- **and we won 't have the resources to respond**
* Steve Chabot will get the message that **he is getting away with his corruption**

We're setting a goal of $10,000 in grassroots donations before the year is over, and we can't afford to come up short. **It will greatly impact our chances of winning this race.** We need you to join the fight to defeat Chabot -- [**will you make a donation to our Democratic campaign before our end of quarter deadline?**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_eoq419?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191227_EOQ5_U3_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+will+you+make+a+donation+to+our+Democrat&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191227_EOQ5_U3_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191227_EOQ5_U3_X1") | | | [Chip in $25 ->](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_eoq419?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191227_EOQ5_U3_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=4+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191227_EOQ5_U3_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191227_EOQ5_U3_X1")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump is dismantling the ACA before our eyes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, The Affordable Care Act (ACA) is at risk of being torn up by the Trump administration after a federal appeals court ruled the individual mandate \-- the backbone of the law \-- unconstitutional. Trump immediately hailed the ruling as a victory for Americans, because he does not care about Americans not named Trump. The GOP has repeatedly tried to trash the ACA before going as far as shutting down the federal government in 2013 and trying to repeal it in 2017 with no replacement, but all of their efforts have failed when Americans made their voices heard and demanded it stay. But this lawsuit could gut protections for people with pre-existing conditions without taking the will of the people into account, so if you believe we need to protect healthcare \-- not let Trump and the courts strip it away from millions \-- we need you to make your voice heard again today: **[Demand Congress save the Affordable Care Act >>](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf01/6e9863e8/1771b8fa/1db04a74/650024240/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/9LgytTH_")** Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf01/6e9863e8/1771b8fa/1db04a7a/650024240/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191227a.ND&refcode2=E9l5viKhkORtOYfcbiyb")
---
|
---

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, The Affordable Care Act (ACA) is at risk of being torn up by the Trump administration after a federal appeals court ruled the individual mandate \-- the backbone of the law \-- unconstitutional. Trump immediately hailed the ruling as a victory for Americans, because he does not care about Americans not named Trump. The GOP has repeatedly tried to trash the ACA before going as far as shutting down the federal government in 2013 and trying to repeal it in 2017 with no replacement, but all of their efforts have failed when Americans made their voices heard and demanded it stay. But this lawsuit could gut protections for people with pre-existing conditions without taking the will of the people into account, so if you believe we need to protect healthcare \-- not let Trump and the courts strip it away from millions \-- we need you to make your voice heard again today: "" Thanks for your support, WDTO Team "" | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC PO Box 15320 Washington, DC 20003 ""

name: 314 Action
subject: Let's talk about our progress this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| 314 is working day and night supporting Democrats across the country that actually believe in science and the climate crisis. We have the unique ability to target and support national campaigns across the country. From Maine to Alaska, 314 is supporting candidates who will fight back in the name of scientific progress.

We have some specific goals in mind. By the end of 2020, we want to help:
* Defeat Mitch McConnell in Kentucky
* Elect Mark Kelly to the Senate in Arizona
* Defend Democratic Scientists in the House
* Flip the Senate and elect a Democratic President

But, to achieve these goals (and more), **we need your help.**

End of year fundraising is key to how we invest in flipping seats in 2020. The FEC deadline is only days away and climate crisis deniers will be scouring our numbers.

_Remember, the election year is only days away._

[That is why we are calling on all of our supporters. We set an aggressive, ambitious goal of $50,000 to close out 2019. We want Democratic scientists elected in 2020. If you want us to achieve this goal, then chip in $10 to help us get there.](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-decfr?amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+That+is+why+we+are+calling+on+all+of+our&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_1_1&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_1_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_1_1") | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

clean_body: | 314 is working day and night supporting Democrats across the country that actually believe in science and the climate crisis. We have the unique ability to target and support national campaigns across the country. From Maine to Alaska, 314 is supporting candidates who will fight back in the name of scientific progress. We have some specific goals in mind. By the end of 2020, we want to help: Defeat Mitch McConnell in Kentucky Elect Mark Kelly to the Senate in Arizona Defend Democratic Scientists in the House Flip the Senate and elect a Democratic President But, to achieve these goals (and more), we need your help. End of year fundraising is key to how we invest in flipping seats in 2020. The FEC deadline is only days away and climate crisis deniers will be scouring our numbers. Remember, the election year is only days away. "" | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | "" "" "" "" "" "" Make no mistake about it. 2020 is the most consequential election of our lifetimes. We simply can't leave anything to chance. The health of our planet is too important. We plan on going all out next year because we know the stakes are high, and we want you to stand with us. Can you chip in whatever you can to help set us up for success in 2020? "" Thank you, The whole team at 314 Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. "" 314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country. If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can "" to make a donation.

_Hi Friend, I sent you this note earlier this week but wanted to make sure you saw it...We are coming up on our 12/31 deadline, and I need your support today. _ When I decided to run, I knew that I would have to be prepared for attacks. I've been picking a fights with the fossil fuel industry, Wall Street banks, and powerful politicians all my life, and I'm proud to take a stand to defend our future. But the first shots fired in this campaign, are coming from Democrats...Democrats who take money from corporate PAC's and the fossil fuel industry, and are clearly feeling threatened by our surging campaign. name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Ready for 2020
body:
On behalf of our entire Indiana Republican Party team, we hope you had a very merry Christmas! Christmas is a very special time to gather with... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7501d32e75)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_Ready for 2020_** On behalf of our entire Indiana Republican Party team, we hope you had a very merry Christmas! Christmas is a special time to gather with your family and friends, and share in the blessings we've each been granted.

Now as we look ahead to 2020, we're ready. We're ready for an unprecedented election cycle in Indiana. Next year, **Governor Holcomb** will bring together Hoosiers from all corners of Indiana for a campaign all about Putting People First. This campaign will have a team with record resources, and Hoosiers from all 92 counties working together to tell a story about real results.

We're so thankful to have you on our Republican team. I'm so excited for 2020. That's because together, we're ready to WIN!

-Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| **_Indiana Republican Party:
2019 Progress Report_** 2019 was another big year for the Indiana Republican Party, as Hoosiers went to the polls and selected Republicans to lead their city halls in record numbers. Check out this infographic for an update on 2019. We can't wait to deliver even more results in 2020!
---
|
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=543738c405&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Get Ready for 2020:_**
**_Register for Congress of Counties_**
What's the best way to prep for 2020? Register for [Congress of Counties](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6c3e6fbae0&e=1acd9bb3d6), your Indiana Republican Party’s two-day training and networking event.

We look forward to seeing you in downtown Indianapolis on January 31-February 1 to meet Indiana’s Republican leaders and participate in breakout sessions on important campaign topics like candidate recruitment, fundraising, social media, technology, and more!

If you’re an Indiana Republican, this is an event you’ll want to attend next year! Learn more, and book your registration [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fe1179b08a&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
| | **_Upcoming Republican Events_** May 1, 2020: [Meet Sarah Huckabee Sanders](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a08ef754a6&e=1acd9bb3d6) ****Have an upcoming Republican event not listed here? Let us know at [info@indiana.go](mailto:info@indiana.go)[p](mailto:info@indiana.go)! ****

>
We're fighting for big, structural change -- and a government that works for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected.

And together, we're building a grassroots movement to make the ultra-wealthy pay their fair share so everyone in America has the opportunity to succeed.

Because the days of billionaires freeloading off of the economy while working families struggle to get by are over. In a Warren administration, we'll fight to make sure everyone has a chance.

That's why we've released a brand new limited edition "Tax the Ultra-Rich" sticker, so that you can show off what we're fighting for!

**[Chip in any amount today and we'll send you a FREE sticker. name: Team Hickenlooper
subject: Tuesday's FEC deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- We just ran the numbers, and we're currently 1,835 donations short of where we were at this point before our last FEC deadline. That's a problem because we're counting on grassroots donations from Democrats across the state and country to help us raise more than $500,000 online to flip this Senate seat in Colorado next year. Our campaign just scheduled a budget meeting in early January where our leadership is going to make some critical decisions regarding advertising, field budgets and staffing, so it's really important we hit this goal and raise as much money from grassroots donors as possible. [**The FEC deadline is just days away. Can John and our amazing team count on you to make a contribution of $10 (or more) to our campaign before we run out of time?**](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191227-eoy?refcode=em-191227-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191227-eoy?refcode=em-191227-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") The truth is, John is leading in the latest poll of this race and the investments we make in the coming weeks will determine whether or not we can win this election and flip Colorado's Senate seat blue. name: Tina Smith
subject: Good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Sara Gideon is challenging Republican Senator Susan Collins in Maine. She needs our help to win.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191227-gideon?refcode=em191227-gideon&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend --

If we're going to take back the Senate in 2020, it won't be enough to hold strong in Minnesota. Democrats also need to flip _four_ seats to guarantee the majority. One of those seats is in Maine, where **Sara Gideon is challenging Republican Senator Susan Collins.**

The good news is: Sara outraised Collins in the last quarter -- placing her in a strong financial position to pick up this Senate seat.

The bad news is: Collins has millions of dollars at her disposal, and she can count on Mitch McConnell's network of super PACs and special interest groups to add more to the pot whenever she's running low on resources.

Look, this isn't the only Senate race where Republicans have an obscene cash advantage, but it could prove to be a decisive one in a close race like the one we're seeing in Maine. So, I'm asking:

**Will you split a contribution of $10 or more between Sara Gideon's campaign in Maine and ours to help us take back the Senate and get Washington working for the people? I wouldn't ask if it wasn't absolutely important.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191227-gideon?refcode=em191227-gideon&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191227-gideon?refcode=em191227-gideon&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191227-gideon?refcode=em191227-gideon&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191227-gideon?refcode=em191227-gideon&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191227-gideon?refcode=em191227-gideon&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191227-gideon?refcode=em191227-gideon&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
One of our best shots at flipping a Senate seat in 2020 is in Maine, and it's critical we do so. That's why your donation is so important today.

Thank you.

-- Tina
