name: Team Marsha
subject: Will you be one?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
Right out of the gate tonight, all seven of the Democratic presidential candidates continued to assault President Trump, his Administration and the conservative agenda | 3X MATCH IS LIVE If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, clickhere. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDE0Mjg5OTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY2MjQ1Mjk5NgS2&mt=1&rt=0
Just over 24 hours ago, House Democrats impeached President Trump. We didn't think it could get any more embarrassing for the Left... Until today.

Right out of the gate tonight, all seven of the Democratic presidential candidates continued to assault President Trump, his Administration and the conservative agenda. They stood on stage, making more promises that they will never be able to keep, pushing radical policies that would drive up your taxes, disparage our economy, restrict constitutional freedoms and reverse all of the progress made under Republican leadership.

Never has there been such an obvious and orchestrated display of partisan, political theater.

The Left knows that their impeachment proceedings are a sham. That's why Nancy Pelosi refuses to send the articles of impeachment over to the Senate! She knows they will be exposed as a politically-motivated, last-ditch attempt to get a Democratic win up on the board.

President Trump needs your support. Stand with him and reject the Left's phony games—remember thatEMERGENCY TRIPLE MATCHING http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDE0Mjg5OTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY2MjQ1Mjk5NgS2&mt=1&rt=0 is live through MIDNIGHT on FRIDAY.
> 300% Match When You Stand With President Trump < http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDE0Mjg5OTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY2MjQ1Mjk5NgS2&mt=1&rt=0

--- Begin Forwarded Message ---
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
From: Marsha Blackburn (R-TN)
Subject: President Trump Needs You
Date: Wednesday, December 18, 2019 http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDE0Mjg5OTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY2MjQ1Mjk5NgS2&mt=1&rt=0

EMERGENCY 3X MATCHING TO STAND WITH TRUMP: AUTHORIZED http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDE0Mjg5OTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY2MjQ1Mjk5NgS2&mt=1&rt=0

Peter,

House Democrats just cast their votes to impeach President Trump in one of the most partisan, politically-motivated moves in the history of our great nation.

Since the outcome of election night in 2016, the Left has been unhinged, making it their mission to obstruct President Trump and derail the conservative agenda. But the behavior exhibited throughout this sham of an impeachment proceeding is not only appalling and disgraceful, but it is also a downright embarrassment to our country and the experiment in constitutional republicanism that our founding fathers envisioned.

All eyes will be on the Senate, where the articles of impeachment will be presented in a trial.

It has never been more critical that you, as a member of the best grassroots team in the nation, stand with President Trump and unite to strengthen our conservative Senate Majority.

Last year, you stepped up to defend the Senate. This year, it's all on the line. President Trump needs you now, more than ever.

Show our president you stand with him and are committed to protecting our values and agenda—make a contribution before MIDNIGHT ON FRIDAY and get 3X MATCHED http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDE0Mjg5OTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY2MjQ1Mjk5NgS2&mt=1&rt=0

http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDE0Mjg5OTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY2MjQ1Mjk5NgS2&mt=1&rt=0 ACTIVATE 3X MATCH http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDE0Mjg5OTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY2MjQ1Mjk5NgS2&mt=1&rt=0

Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and
Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account.

Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund
PO Box 3750
Brentwood, TN 37024

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund's online community.
Privacy Policy http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDE0Mjg5OTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY2MjQ1Mjk5NgS2&mt=1&rt=0

name: Team MJ Hegar
subject: Electing veterans across the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
These veterans are on the front lines working to create a new Senate in 2020

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890625/7f51f7bc/4a256e76/4ef036ce/4124418138/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **The Mission:**
Raise $25,000 for veterans running for Senate in 2020
by MIDNIGHT tonight

[**Donate now to help hit our critical goal and elect veterans to the Senate in TX, AZ, NC, and KY >>**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890625/7f51f7bc/4a256e76/4ef036cd/4124418138/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-veterans?refcode=email_20191227.2nd__706__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Hi Peter,

Across the country, veterans have stepped up to run for Senate. Like MJ, they're committed to leading with integrity, and putting country over politics -- always.

That's why we're joining with them today with a goal of raising $25,000 to elect veterans in Texas, Arizona, North Carolina, and Kentucky.

**[Will you pitch in right now to help hit this important goal? Your donation will be split between MJ Hegar, Mark Kelly, Cal Cunningham, Amy McGrath, and VoteVets to support veterans running for Senate.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890625/7f51f7bc/4a256e76/4ef036cd/4124418138/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-veterans?refcode=email_20191227.2nd__706__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

These veterans are on the front lines working to create a new Senate in 2020 -- one that protects and improves health care, takes urgent action on gun violence, and works for the _people,_ not the special interests.

We can build that new Senate together -- but we have to make sure each one of these veterans has the resources they need to WIN. Pitch in now to help:

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and will be split evenly between MJ Hegar, Mark Kelly, Cal Cunningham, Amy McGrath, and VoteVets:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890625/7f51f7bc/4a256e76/4ef036cc/4124418138/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-veterans?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191227.2nd__706__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890625/7f51f7bc/4a256e76/4ef036c3/4124418138/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-veterans?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191227.2nd__706__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890625/7f51f7bc/4a256e76/4ef036c2/4124418138/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-veterans?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191227.2nd__706__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890625/7f51f7bc/4a256e76/4ef036c1/4124418138/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-veterans?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191227.2nd__706__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890625/7f51f7bc/4a256e76/4ef036c0/4124418138/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-veterans?refcode=email_20191227.2nd__706__")**
Thanks, y'all.

\-- Team MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890625/7f51f7bc/4a256e76/4ef036cd/4124418138/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-veterans?refcode=email_20191227.2nd__706__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: Addisu Demissie
subject: An update on the campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| I wanted to share some news with you, team. **Hey team -- I want you to be the first to know that we 're going back up on TV in Iowa beginning Monday. **This was possible because _you_ stepped up and invested in this campaign. Thank you. That's why I wanted to take this opportunity before the new year to update you about our plan to position Cory for success in Iowa and beyond. **Our theory in this race has always been organize, organize, organize ... and get hot at the end. Well, the Iowa caucuses are 38 days away and it's time to get hot. [But in order to do that, we need to make sure voters are able to learn more about Cory. Here's how we're going to do just that:](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191227_AD_20191227-fr-AD-EM2-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
1. We will start with our first major television ad campaign directly to Iowa caucus-goers on Monday.
2. We'll begin the six-figure TV buy in the Des Moines and Cedar Rapids markets to reach the largest concentrations of Democratic caucus-goers. (If we surpass our income projections, we'll expand our buy and go up across Iowa and in other early states.)

_**Here 's how you can help:**_
1. Airtime is expensive. With sufficient resources, we'd like to continue to expand our Iowa television buy across the state and begin TV and radio advertising in South Carolina. [**Every dollar counts. Please consider chipping in our average online contribution of $22 -- or whatever you can afford to give -- today.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191227_AD_20191227-fr-AD-EM2-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

**You can find the full memo below if you 'd like to read more, team. Thanks for helping us get here. I'm so proud to be on this campaign with you.** Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191227_AD_20191227-fr-AD-EM2-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **TO: Cory 2020 Supporters and Friends
FROM: Addisu Demissie, Campaign Manager, Cory 2020
DATE: Friday, December 27, 2019
RE: Update on Cory's Path to the Nomination -- and Our Plan to Win** Happy holidays! I wanted to take this opportunity before the new year to update our campaign's supporters and friends about our plan to position Cory for success in Iowa and beyond. As you know, December has been an important month for Cory Booker and our campaign. Thanks to a narrowing field, an upswing in financial support, growing interest from caucus-goers and voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, Nevada, and South Carolina, and our strong on-the-ground organization, Cory has a real path to win the nomination. But the challenges before us are real too -- namely, meeting the polling threshold to qualify for the January debate stage and having sufficient resources for paid communications with Iowa caucus-goers who are just tuning in and making their final decisions about whom to support. We have fewer resources for paid communications than some of our top competitors, but we can overcome that gap with greater efficiency and discipline in communicating our message, which we know is the most compelling and persuasive in the field. We just need to make sure the right audiences -- particularly in Iowa -- see and hear it. That's why we wanted to write to you today: to outline Cory's winning message, our plan to communicate it to Iowans, and how much more we can do with your support. _**OUR GOALS RIGHT NOW:**_ Our path to the nomination starts with two fundamental goals. **First, we want to ensure that Cory makes the January debate stage in Iowa.** While we believe that the increased polling requirements are misguided given how few polls we've seen since the November debate, the rules are now set and we're sprinting at the polls we need to make it to the stage. The good news: we've already hit the donor threshold of 225,000 unique individual donors. The January debate in Iowa is a key opportunity to engage with voters and build our momentum at a time when caucus-goers and early state voters are tuning in, often for the first time, and paying attention to the debate and preparing to make final decisions about whom to support. And with the debate thresholds announced so late, we need to do everything we can now to make sure Cory is on that stage. Second, our road to the nomination begins in Iowa. Performing well in the Hawkeye State is essential to our path to victory. Once we make the January debate stage we will turn our full attention toward beating expectations in Iowa, which will set us up for strong performances in the February gauntlet of early state nominating contests leading to Super Tuesday, but to do that we need to invest now. _**OUR PLAN:**_ Our theory in this race has always been organize, organize, organize... and get hot at the end. Well, the Iowa caucuses are 38 days away and it's time to get hot. We've built the best organizing team in the 2020 presidential field in the early states, starting in Iowa. But we need to make sure voters are able to learn more about Cory's biography, values, and vision and get our ground game in a position to close the deal with caucus-goers. We have committed to an Iowa-focused advertising plan to persuade caucus-goers that they should pick Cory. We recognize that we will need to raise more funds immediately to grow our advertising budget to bring our program to scale, and will be asking for your help as our supporters to make this happen. In the meantime, we are being smart with your support and are carefully prioritizing our investments. We're starting with this:
1. Earlier this month, Cory 2020 announced a $500,000 down payment on television and digital persuasion ads in Iowa. We will start with our first major television ad campaign making our closing argument to Iowa caucus-goers on Monday, December 30.
2. We'll begin with a six-figure TV buy in the Des Moines and Cedar Rapids markets to make sure we are getting our message out to the largest concentrations of Democratic caucus-goers. We'll also continue digital advertising across the state. Should we exceed our income projections, we'll increase our TV frequency in Des Moines and Cedar Rapids, as well as add in the high value Omaha and Quad Cities markets.
3. We are front-loading our planned January buy early in the month to help us run at both of our core goals -- to reach Iowans while the final debate-qualifying polls are in the field and in the persuasion window before the Caucus.

Here's what we'd like to do next:
1. Airtime is expensive. With sufficient resources, we'd like to continue to expand our Iowa television buy across the state and begin TV and radio advertising in South Carolina. [**Every dollar counts. Please consider chipping in our average online contribution of $22 -- or whatever you can afford to give -- today.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191227_AD_20191227-fr-AD-EM2-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

_**OUR MESSAGE:**_ We will continue through the Iowa Caucus and beyond with the same message with which we began this campaign -- the same message that has propelled Cory's entire career. There is no substitute for an authentic message, and, frankly, Cory wouldn't have it any other way. We will work over the coming weeks to ensure tight message discipline across the campaign, from volunteers and organizers to every department in headquarters. That message is: If you want to bring a fight, you bring people together. The stronger the coalition, the greater the victory. And we need to bring a fight. The stakes in this election are enormous -- this is a struggle for the soul of our nation, which is being corrupted by the powerful, by the greedy, and by bullies, bigots, and demogogues who are trying to tear us apart to serve themselves. In this moment, we need one another -- because fighting together is the only way we are going to beat Donald Trump and heal our country. That's the only way change has ever happened in America. That's why it's time to choose Cory Booker for president. He will help us see our common pain, ignite our spirit of common purpose, and inspire us to fight together to not only win this election, but to take on the biggest challenges in our country that are leaving so many people and so many communities behind. Cory has spent his entire career running at the toughest challenges and bringing people together to accomplish things others said were impossible. Inspired by the work of civil rights activists who helped his family integrate an all-white community, Cory moved to an inner-city neighborhood in Newark after law school to help tenants fight slumlords and help families stay in their homes. He's never left, and has delivered as a mayor and U.S. Senator, turning the tide against mass incarceration and sparking historic investment in vulnerable communities. From taking on the NRA and the scourge of gun violence in our communities, to fighting for big economic changes that lift up those who have been struggling and deliver opportunity for all, to transforming a broken criminal justice system that disproportionately hurts poor and Black and Brown communities, Cory will make justice and opportunity real for every American as president by uniting us in the fight. _**OUR TARGET AUDIENCE:**_ While Cory and this campaign will seek support from every corner of Iowa and beyond, in the interest of efficiency, we'll target our paid communications to our key audience of Democratic women -- particularly college-educated women, women of color, and older women. We expect Cory's strength to be in urban and, especially, suburban areas of the state. In particular, the 3rd Congressional District -- which includes Polk County and its western and southern suburbs, as well as most of southwest Iowa -- is where we expect to show our strength and win the most delegates come caucus night. We will spend much of Cory's time and our limited resources in this area, which is largely covered by the Des Moines media market, over the course of the last month leading up to the caucuses. We believe that we can and should win delegates in the other largest urban/suburban centers of the state (Cedar Rapids, Davenport/Quad Cities, Iowa City, Waterloo, and the two western cities of Council Bluffs and Sioux City), but we need additional resources to ensure that happens. Underscoring all of this is the understanding -- supported by public and private data -- that even at this late stage of the race, most Democratic voters still remain unfamiliar with Cory's record of accomplishments, his platform, and his biography. This is not due to lack of effort or, in the case of the February states, investment, but rather the reality of a crowded field, a media environment dominated by impeachment and other non-election news, and an electorate that historically has not fully tuned in until the closing weeks of a campaign. _**HOW YOU CAN HELP:**_ If you're receiving this memo, your support has gotten Cory and our campaign this far. You've helped build one of the strongest organizing teams in this race. You've contributed, traveled to see him in person, shared your time to knock doors or make calls, and amplified his message on social media -- we couldn't be more grateful. With your support, we've organized, organized, organized. Now, your support will help us get hot at the end. With your support, we can strengthen and expand our Iowa TV and digital buys and begin TV and radio in South Carolina. [_**Please consider chipping in our average online contribution of $22, or whatever you can afford up to $2,800, to power our closing argument.**_](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191227_AD_20191227-fr-AD-EM2-actives_actives_l4&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you all. I see you, and I love you.
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c98/5fca0d19/7bc33892/291cf5a5/4044558961/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c98/5fca0d19/7bc33892/291cf5a4/4044558961/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c98/5fca0d19/7bc33892/291cf5a3/4044558961/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c98/5fca0d19/7bc33892/291cf5a2/4044558961/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c98/5fca0d19/7bc33892/291cf5a1/4044558961/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c98/5fca0d19/7bc33892/291cf5a5/4044558961/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

body:
Let’s get Andrew to the January debate!

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5154%2E377263%2EMu3tSi) **Qualified for January Debate?
NOT YET **

✅ 225,000 unique donors
✅ Poll 1: NPR/PBS Newshour/Marist National
❌ **Poll 2: National or Early State
❌ Poll 3: National or Early State
❌ Poll 4: National or Early State **

[Help us get the last three polls.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20508?t=5&akid=5154%2E377263%2EMu3tSi) Yang Gang --

Everything you’ve done for this campaign is paying off.

Thanks to you, Yang Gang, we have qualified for every single debate so far.

**But unfortunately, the DNC raised its thresholds yet again for the January debate, leaving us with only one of the four qualifying polls needed to get Andrew to next month’s stage.**

We saw a surge in momentum following the December debate and welcomed thousands of new members into the Yang Gang -- proving that we can’t afford to miss January’s debate.

[The stakes are even higher and we need you to step up right now, Yang Gang. Give anything you can to keep this momentum up. We can only hit the last three polls we need with your help: ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20508?t=7&akid=5154%2E377263%2EMu3tSi) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20508?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=5154%2E377263%2EMu3tSi)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20508?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=5154%2E377263%2EMu3tSi)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20508?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=5154%2E377263%2EMu3tSi)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20508?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=5154%2E377263%2EMu3tSi)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20508?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=5154%2E377263%2EMu3tSi)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20508?t=13&amount=25&akid=5154%2E377263%2EMu3tSi)

The January debate will be our last chance to get Andrew in front of a massive national audience before people start voting and caucusing.

We have to get him qualified. To do that, we need your support today.

[Rush a donation right now and make sure we have the resources we need to get these last few polls. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20508?t=14&akid=5154%2E377263%2EMu3tSi)

We can’t do this without you,

Team Yang
**Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that, our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Pitch in now so we can show everyone the power of this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20508?t=6&akid=5154%2E377263%2EMu3tSi)

But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=5154%2E377263%2EMu3tSi) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5154%2E377263%2EMu3tSi) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: Brindisi and Bloomberg team up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:

Anthony Brindisi claims to be moderate, but his votes and actions in Congress show just how liberal he is. He’s voted for restrictive gun control measures, taxpayer funded abortions, and cuts to our military.

In fact, Anthony is one of the most liberal members of Congress: he’s voted with President Trump just 7% of the time! That’s less than Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff, and even self-proclaimed socialist Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez.

We need someone in Congress who represents our values, not the values of New York City liberals.

**Chip in now to stand up to extreme liberal Anthony Brindisi!**
[ **STAND UP TO ANTHONY BRINDISI** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=c9f5dec3568449f1958e616552fe8d11&_e=iAPOsUFMi_55tRHq3e6tkrP9lSFf984MkivgG7Ng5wXfbGBe_Rs3izXBLoo6CY7oNwpJtK1_Z9aqlFvx04oM5nCKTvWm3ureCi_57E3-mTPN4qCedO2zv-WL-h2J9rV3GuAJJIYIMKYe63iXwViUHFmd8Iz5Il7MEhT4c2BgM0OuMZY0dyTKH32HQW13KPfMeD78q5Wt7mxDAMftSt-J6T7ePkci8VMa9B3eh5J8rTRWysF4tlYjs7lHM168VS2vcvqTZdNU5VQNRFHbrfPUF8rr_50i5QomISXef8i8CoqUJ7w-B8-MyKYVNt3P8-XGagyIH3Cf_uoNb9Uf2iMVsy2HoIEydHdyMCQDw7l5W4Bj-i-a-gU1HVFSH-b4YjDzd5tDrq9YjcJnYSPefpSQGmugmHdppwIu48_nRL_mYqE%3D)

name: EdMarkey.com
subject: We're taking a bit of a risk with this goal:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
We've set an ambitious goal heading into the deadline. | |
---
| Friends -

Our final FEC deadline of the year is just a few days away, and this is a big one.

So we've set an ambitious goal heading into the deadline. We're trying to raise $100,000 online to make it clear to everyone that Ed is up for this fight and the people are behind him.

**[Will you make a $3 donation to help us hit our deadline goal? We would not ask if this were not so important.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfe6/693b8b0a/439285c9/72de71e6/116851088/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjctZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191227-full")**

This is the first full fundraising quarter since Joe Kennedy entered the race.

When we file our public report, all eyes will be on our race comparing our numbers. That's why it's so important for us to have a strong showing ahead of this deadline.

We need your help to do that. The only way we'll hit this goal is if lots and lots of people step up to give whatever they can afford. Can Ed count on you to be one of them?

**[Please make a $3 donation ahead of our biggest FEC deadline to date. All eyes will be on our race soon, and we want everyone to see how powerful our movement is.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfe6/693b8b0a/439285c9/72de71e6/116851088/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjctZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191227-full")**

We're taking a bit of a risk setting such a large goal. There's no guarantee that we can get there, but it's what we need to raise to make sure we're in a strong position heading into 2020.

Thanks in advance for helping us get there. We'll keep you updated on our progress.

\- Team Markey **[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfe6/693b8b0a/439285c9/72de71e6/116851088/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjctZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191227-full")**

subject: Re: Will I see you tomorrow?

body:
We're excited to see you tomorrow for a Fiesta Bowl Parade watch party. After a few days of rain, the forecast for tomorrow is partly cloudy with a 10% chance of rain -- so we sure hope the weather holds!

**[If you plan to join us, please be at 2 West Marshall Avenue around 8:15 A.M and the parade will start at 9 AM.](https://act.myngp.com/el/12GPraj_spzGHqT2bj6HnWEk3qMTWTVWV_fDys4srcA=/wenAwfFbMsSvP4pUn7Gu9qlszCFHBZWYAGB8LKbP09E=)**

We look forward to hopefully seeing you tomorrow!

If you have any questions call Andrew at: 602-456-1229

_\-- StantonforArizona.com_

name: Team Charles Booker
subject: the next four days are critical
body:
|
---
We’ll be frank, folks: Our fundraising numbers over the next four days will determine the future of our movement to defeat Mitch McConnell. Charles Booker will keep bringing people together to demand our fair share no matter what. But whether he does that as a candidate for Senate depends on if we have the resources and support to continue. If you believe that every voice deserves to be heard ... If you believe that we need to see an end to the corruption and greed ... If you believe that we need a senator who puts Kentuckians first ... **_****_**[Chip in whatever you can so we have the resources to defeat Mitch McConnell once and for all. body:
TAKE THE POLL: Do you approve of McConnell's cruel and disastrous Senate leadership?
---
| | **I 'll be quick -- this is your final chance to submit your McConnell Approval response before the year ends. ** [_**Democrats are just ONE point shy of overtaking McConnell in the polls. I need 10,000 responses to make sure we start the year off AHEAD of McConnell. Will you take my critical poll before time runs out? >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77a/18e32a7f/509248ba/7b228c01/2620095391/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-approval-survey?source=20191227_em_pet_b1_lujan_all") -Ben Ray **\----------- Forwarded Message -----------** From: Ben Ray Lujan Date: Thursday, December 26, 2019 **MCCONNELL: 47% DEMOCRATS: 46%** | [**10,000 ANTI-MCCONNELL RESPONSES NEEDED**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77a/18e32a7f/509248ba/7b228c01/2620095391/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-approval-survey?source=20191227_em_pet_b1_lujan_all") Wow!! Mitch McConnell's lead in the polls PLUNGED to just one point. With one final Democratic surge, we can OVERTAKE McConnell and start the new year off with a HUGE burst of Democratic momentum. [**TAKE THE POLL: Do you approve of McConnell 's cruel and disastrous Senate leadership?**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77a/18e32a7f/509248ba/7b228c01/2620095391/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-approval-survey?source=20191227_em_pet_b1_lujan_all") [**NO!! >>**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77a/18e32a7f/509248ba/7b228c01/2620095391/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-approval-survey?source=20191227_em_pet_b1_lujan_all")** **[Yes](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77a/18e32a7f/509248ba/7b228c01/2620095391/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-approval-survey?source=20191227_em_pet_b1_lujan_all")****
---

This has been one of the worst years of Mitch McConnell's entire career.

And the polls prove it: Democrats are now just ONE point shy of overtaking him.

With one final Democratic surge before the year ends, we can overtake McConnell once and for all.

**Let 's make sure the first thing McConnell sees in 2020 is him LOSING to Democrats. **

[_**10,000 ANTI-MCCONNELL RESPONSES NEEDED: Before the year ends, take the final McConnell Approval Poll to prove we want him OUT of office and OUT of the Senate. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77a/18e32a7f/509248ba/7b228c01/2620095391/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-approval-survey?source=20191227_em_pet_b1_lujan_all")

Thank you,

Team Ben Ray

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77a/18e32a7f/509248ba/7b228c06/2620095391/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77a/18e32a7f/509248ba/7b228c07/2620095391/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77a/18e32a7f/509248ba/7b228c04/2620095391/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77a/18e32a7f/509248ba/7b228c05/2620095391/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77a/18e32a7f/509248ba/7b228c3a/2620095391/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77a/18e32a7f/509248ba/7b228c3b/2620095391/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Democratic Polling Center
subject: this is huge for Dems
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
| | **_ CNN POLLING UPDATE:_
**Six in 10 Americans believe Trump does NOT deserve a second term****
---
Team, we haven't heard from you:
**Does Donald Trump deserve a second term?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTY3Njg0ODUS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTgwMzcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTY3Njg0ODUS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTgwMzcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Team: From the first MINUTE of his presidency, Trump has spewed racism, cozied up to dictators and fired anyone who disagrees with him. **Now the House has impeached him! Despite all this, Trump still thinks he should get to keep damaging our country for FOUR MORE YEARS.**
**The American people know better:** CNN released a poll saying six in 10 Americans believe Trump does NOT deserve a second term - but we haven't heard from you.
If this can be confirmed, it would be HUGE for Democrats, so we're conducting our own Trump Approval poll. **But we 're still 36 responses short in 34223 to reach statistical significance, and the poll closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight.**** Tell us now:**
| | **Does Donald Trump deserve a second term?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTY3Njg0ODUS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTgwMzcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Walking Loomer
body:
You’ve heard the saying, “all politics is local” and it’s so true. I’m on the ground EVERY DAY in my home district.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-358423-837186-4791619-3aa0ea7af4-425356d211)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-358423-837186-4791618-343b546400-425356d211) You’ve heard the saying, “all politics is local” and it’s so true.

I’m on the ground EVERY DAY in my home district.

Each morning, I take my English Bulldog, Loomer, on a walk through our neighborhood talking to neighbors, business owners, and Law Enforcement officers.

When I started this campaign, I’d get a friendly whisper from someone, saying they support me or President Trump.

Their hushed tones made it appear that they were part of an underground resistance against the Left. They were afraid of blowback from angry liberals if they exposed their patriotism in our community.

Today, especially following the unjust impeachment of our president, the tone has changed.

Conservatives in my community – and I suspect yours – are no longer the Silent Majority.

They are standing up and willing to fight for our Republic.

Since Democrats showed their willingness to trample the Constitution to take back the White House in 2020, it’s no longer Republicans against Democrats.

The 2020 Elections are now a contest to save our nation.

**We can sit back, and watch America turn into Europe or worse,[or we can prepare, organize and go on the offensive](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-358423-837186-4791618-343b546400-425356d211).**

**Let’s go on the offensive together.[Please donate today.](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-358423-837186-4791618-343b546400-425356d211)**
A typical Republican candidate doesn’t have a chance against my opponent Lois Frankel because all Lois has to do is call up her buddies Shalala, Wasserman-Schultz and Pelosi, and the radical socialist cavalry (and millions of dollars) are on the way.

It takes someone with NATIONAL support to crash through the Blue Wall – **and that’s where you come in and I’m grateful to have your support**.

Last quarter, our campaign outraised all other candidates combined – including Frankel – **and our support came from ALL 50 states!**

As 2019 comes to a close, we have to do it again and [**I respectfully ask that you send in a donation as you finish reading this message**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-358423-837186-4791618-343b546400-425356d211).

**My district has 150,000 swing voters and Republican voter registration is on the rise!**

By ending the Democrats’ grasp on Florida 21, we’ll be helping President Trump hold or increase his lead in Florida, and together, we can keep any of the socialist presidential candidates from occupying the White House in 2021.

[**Let’s make that happen together.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-358423-837186-4791618-343b546400-425356d211)

**Just four days remain to report our quarterly fundraising totals to the FEC.**

And since our last filing deadline, one MASSIVE thing has happened!

**President and Mrs. Trump are now residents and voters in my district.**

Their current representative in Congress, my opponent Lois Frankel, proudly voted to impeach the President . . . and is already planning “Impeachment 2.0.”

I’ll tell you more about her plans tomorrow, but today, please don’t delay and [**send in a year-end contribution that will help flip this crucial Congressional District red**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-358423-837186-4791618-343b546400-425356d211).

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

I’m on the ground EVERY DAY in my home district. | | | Patriot, You’ve heard the saying, “all politics is local” and it’s so true. I’m on the ground EVERY DAY in my home district. Each morning, I take my English Bulldog, Loomer, on a walk through our neighborhood talking to neighbors, business owners, and Law Enforcement officers. When I started this campaign, I’d get a friendly whisper from someone, saying they support me or President Trump. Their hushed tones made it appear that they were part of an underground resistance against the Left. They were afraid of blowback from angry liberals if they exposed their patriotism in our community. Today, especially following the unjust impeachment of our president, the tone has changed. Conservatives in my community – and I suspect yours – are no longer the Silent Majority. They are standing up and willing to fight for our Republic. Since Democrats showed their willingness to trample the Constitution to take back the White House in 2020, it’s no longer Republicans against Democrats. The 2020 Elections are now a contest to save our nation. We can sit back, and watch America turn into Europe or worse,. Let’s go on the offensive together. A typical Republican candidate doesn’t have a chance against my opponent Lois Frankel because all Lois has to do is call up her buddies Shalala, Wasserman-Schultz and Pelosi, and the radical socialist cavalry (and millions of dollars) are on the way. It takes someone with NATIONAL support to crash through the Blue Wall – and that’s where you come in and I’m grateful to have your support. Last quarter, our campaign outraised all other candidates combined – including Frankel – and our support came from ALL 50 states! As 2019 comes to a close, we have to do it again and . My district has 150,000 swing voters and Republican voter registration is on the rise! name: Erik Polyak, 314ActionFund.org
subject: I just got some news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| Hi --

I wanted to flag our email from this morning. We are mere days away from 2020 and the most critical election of our lifetimes. I also just got some incredible news from some of our most dedicated supporters.

**If we raise $15,000 within the next 48 hours, then they will match all donations until midnight on December 31st.**

[Can you chip in $10 in the next 48 hours to help us unlock the match?](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-decfr?amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+chip+in+ask+in+the+next+48+hours&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2")

[https://secure.314action.org/2019_FEC_Deadline](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-decfr?amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+httpssecure314actionorg2019FECDeadline&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2")

**\--- Begin Forwarded Message ---**

314 is working day and night supporting Democrats across the country that actually believe in science and the climate crisis. We have the unique ability to target and support national campaigns across the country. From Maine to Alaska, 314 is supporting candidates who will fight back in the name of scientific progress.

We have some specific goals in mind. By the end of 2020, we want to help:
* Defeat Mitch McConnell in Kentucky
* Elect Mark Kelly to the Senate in Arizona
* Defend Democratic Scientists in the House
* Flip the Senate and elect a Democratic President

But, to achieve these goals (and more), **we need your help.**

End of year fundraising is key to how we invest in flipping seats in 2020. The FEC deadline is only days away and climate crisis deniers will be scouring our numbers.

_Remember, the election year is only days away._

[That is why we are calling on all of our supporters. We set an aggressive, ambitious goal of $50,000 to close out 2019. We want Democratic scientists elected in 2020. If you want us to achieve this goal, then chip in $10 to help us get there.](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-decfr?amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+That+is+why+we+are+calling+on+all+of+our&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2") | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

[Donate $100 Now](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-decfr?amount=100&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+Donate+ask+Now&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2")
[Another Amount](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-decfr?amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=9+-+Another+Amount&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2")
Make no mistake about it. 2020 is the most consequential election of our lifetimes. We simply can't leave anything to chance. The health of our planet is too important.

We plan on going all out next year because we know the stakes are high, and we want you to stand with us.

**Can you chip in whatever you can to help set us up for success in 2020?**

[https://secure.314action.org/2019_FEC_Deadline](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-decfr?amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=10+-+httpssecure314actionorg2019FECDeadline&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2")

Thank you,

The whole team at 314

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb432e/4bd7760e/45a057e6/77ad2657/3237287851/VEsHBw/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=12+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191227_2_2")** to make a donation.

name: David Hill
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | [](http://links
body:
Peter, In the next week you’re going to hear a lot from me and my team about our FEC deadline and end of quarter fundraising goal. I wanted to take a minute to explain why they are so important to this campaign. At the end of each quarter the Federal Election Commission (FEC) requires candidates to report their campaign contributions and expenditures. These reports are made public in order to ensure the people know where candidates get money from and how they spend it. **But it's a fact that these reports are also political.** What happens by December 31st will often make the news — telling everyone, candidates, political parties, and people interested in politics just how prepared our campaign might be for the election in 2020. That's why FEC deadlines are important, especially this one. It’s our very first FEC deadline and the number that we report will show just how strong our campaign is so far. Not only are we building momentum to take with us into the new year but we are trying to start the election year off on the right foot. We have a lot of work to do in the next two weeks to hit our end of quarter fundraising goal of $4,000. **Will you donate to put your name and your dollars behind our first FEC report?** [ DONATE NOW >> ](http://links.oklahomaforhill.com/u/click?_t=3f8f472f46d84bffaa7cbc7593ac1005&_m=629ecc2bb76f46f4b34aa0e68e4b8571&_e=tvK8j-wgI5QiBTI9PouAYArJjHuN6EApkjwKc9XBJh-WP_QkYTREqadvTQZ-ZA-PGEnVN5XTtbhFhT_JkJ1LDdE1Y9xIH7jq8kuYZEwiMG6o6IXcRJnYi-jYJXKh2GcRqvIILZ2YgZ9GZO9zHwroGLwQvriaaLMMcaJTPLaQBaLB2E1f5J7KC1tzocPPpuLWTF2dJsYl3xUzpjgGlUie0hBHSIqAqw7ixM_HOJDuS3Ve7ZHyi35DzRoxk4hKonJ0WqN2q1GjVfOt6Kt3pakYuBmRs24TNOxrDwzxwS42JvNtu5Vxt9L-X8xQIVfFJXhe2NSFsKLHaTS7K4-kAjohpQ%3D%3D) Our grassroots army has just taken off and is gaining momentum- I want you to be a part of it. clean_body: Peter, In the next week you’re going to hear a lot from me and my team about our FEC deadline and end of quarter fundraising goal. I wanted to take a minute to explain why they are so important to this campaign. At the end of each quarter the Federal Election Commission (FEC) requires candidates to report their campaign contributions and expenditures. These reports are made public in order to ensure the people know where candidates get money from and how they spend it. But it's a fact that these reports are also political. What happens by December 31st will often make the news — telling everyone, candidates, political parties, and people interested in politics just how prepared our campaign might be for the election in 2020. That's why FEC deadlines are important, especially this one. It’s our very first FEC deadline and the number that we report will show just how strong our campaign is so far. Not only are we building momentum to take with us into the new year but we are trying to start the election year off on the right foot. We have a lot of work to do in the next two weeks to hit our end of quarter fundraising goal of $4,000. Will you donate to put your name and your dollars behind our first FEC report? Our grassroots army has just taken off and is gaining momentum- I want you to be a part of it. Together, we will fix Congress. Thank you for your support, David Hill PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | | | | ---|---|---|---

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc964/3eb3e2fc/69b06e13/744ed51c/2625885763/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191227_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191227_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc964/3eb3e2fc/69b06e13/744ed51b/2625885763/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191227_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191227_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). name: Chuck Schumer
subject: why I'm reaching out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
The most important race happening in 2020 is for control of the Senate.
| | |
---
I will not be the first, nor will I be the last to tell you this, friends: **The most important race happening in 2020 is for control of the Senate.**
I have a front-row seat to the damage Mitch McConnell is causing in the Senate. He is blocking every last attempt at progress that our Democratic colleagues in the House are fighting so hard for - environmental protections, gun safety measures, affordable healthcare. **If a Democrat wins the White House, they MUST have the Senate as well. **
That's why I'm reaching out to you about Gary Peters' race in Michigan. Experts from FiveThirtyEight to Roll Call say Democrats can win back the Senate - **_but only if Gary wins in Michigan. _**
The thing is that Gary's reelection won't be easy. He's one of two Democratic Senate candidates fighting to win in a state President Trump carried. To top it all off, Gary is winning by just one point - 44% to 43% - over his hard-right opponent, handpicked by Trump and McConnell.
**So here's the deal: I told Gary I'd help him raise $6,500 to protect Michigan's Democratic Senate seat, and we really need to hit that goal before midnight. Can I count on you to give now and help us take back the Senate majority? **
**[Please, click here to give $5 or more to help Gary Peters keep Michigan blue, defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da93a/5721a3ed/706d6acd/efb4001/164308145/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxNzctZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk177-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
**[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk177-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=5")** **[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk177-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=25")** **[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk177-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da93a/5721a3ed/706d6acd/efb4001/164308145/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxNzctZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk177-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
The path to taking back the Senate for Democrats is a tough one. But it runs straight through Michigan, and that's why we need to make supporting Gary a priority. I appreciate you stepping up and being a part of this fight.

Chuck

name: Team Hick
subject: bumping
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
| | **Folks: we wanted to make sure you saw John's email from yesterday. Once our FEC numbers become public, everyone from Mitch McConnell to Donald Trump will search our report for any sign of weakness. We can't let them find us vulnerable. ** **[If you can, please make a contribution of any amount today to help us raise $500,000 online by the FEC deadline on December 31st.](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191227-bump?refcode=em-191227-c&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** | [DONATE TODAY](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191227-bump?refcode=em-191227-c&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
\---------- Forwarded message from John Hickenlooper ----------
Folks -- I'll make this quick.
We're about to close the books on the first full quarter of our campaign and will have to report not just how much we have raised, but how many folks have stepped up to chip in so far.

**Everyone, from the media pundits to our Republican opponent 's right-wing billionaire backers, will obsessively pore over this report to determine whether or not we're in a strong position to win. **

Any sign of weakness could invite McConnell's dark money network to ramp up their attacks on our campaign, and we cannot let that happen.

Right now, we're behind on our $500,000 year-end fundraising goal. But I am convinced we can catch up if folks like you step up before our report goes public in just a few days. That's why I'm asking:

[**Will you make a contribution of $10 (or more!) before our critical FEC fundraising deadline? I 'm not taking any money from corporate PACs -- so the only way we can hit this goal is if you chip in:**](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191227-bump?refcode=em-191227-c&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191227-bump?refcode=em-191227-c&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
I am very proud of the campaign we're running. It's full of so much life, passion, and courage -- and we're ready to win this thing. When we file our report to the FEC, I want everyone to see that energy, too.

I hope I can count on you to step up today. Thanks in advance!

-- John

[DONATE TODAY](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191227-bump?refcode=em-191227-c&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: Wendy Davis
subject: Pink shoes. 13 hours. Austin, TX.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
Hearing from people like you shapes everything I do.
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "http://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-priorities_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk34-su-nd-v1")
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "http://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-priorities_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk34-su-nd-v1")
Friends,
Hearing from supporters like you has always been important to me. ****[That's why I've put together this quick priorities survey for you to submit your thoughts on the issues. Can you take a minute to let me know what's on your mind?](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "http://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-priorities_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk34-su-nd-v1")****
Listen, I may have been the one in the pink shoes, but that nearly 13-hour filibuster in the Texas Senate wasn't about me. It was about the thousands of activists who supported the effort from throughout the capitol: They drowned out the secretary of the senate's effort to take a roll call vote - blocking the vote on that anti-abortion bill by getting us past the midnight deadline.
It was about the thousands of people who were willing to share their stories - over 16,000 of them - filling binders with courageous narratives that spilled over the top of my desk. And it was about people like you who were galvanized by the effort. I couldn't have fought through it without the grassroots community that stood beside me.
Winning this congressional campaign will require the same. As one of the most competitive House races in the country, it will take all of us coming together and fighting for what's right to succeed. **That 's why I need to get your feedback on the issues that are most important to you.**
**[I've put together a priorities survey for you to easily submit your feedback. Can you take a minute to send me your input on the issues that matter most to you? I'm hoping to gather another 87 responses by midnight.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "http://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-priorities_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk34-su-nd-v1")**
Hearing what's on your mind helps shape our campaign. It keeps us grounded in the real issues that impact folks day in and day out. Thanks so much for taking the time, and I can't wait to read the responses and report back on what we learn.
In solidarity,
-Wendy

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a9c/704929dc/16016edb/39939c58/178200571/VEsD/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a9c/704929dc/16016edb/39939c5b/178200571/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a9c/704929dc/16016edb/39939c5a/178200571/VEsB/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")
Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
---

body:
We need your help. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/403f9b4206b8/calling-all-patriots-12114173?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=1ca6d5af69&e=795c6d9796)
---

| [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=2dbb676dcb&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Peter,

In just 4 days the last fundraising quarter of 2019 ends.

That's a big deal, because after the deadline every candidate in this race will have to show their totals. What happens next is largely based off of who comes out on top in the resources race.

We have incredible grassroots support behind our campaign. Thank you, truly. But now we need your help to show it by the deadline in just four days. [**Will you donate just $5, for Oklahoma's 5th district, to help us have a strong showing?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=dc760477dc&e=795c6d9796)

Kendra Horn has failed Oklahomans. She enabled a sham impeachment inquiry and then voted for it the day the final vote came up. She has shown her true colors--she is no moderate. The Republican nominee from this district is almost guaranteed to beat her in 2020, but we have to make sure it is no ordinary Republican.

We need to send a strong fighter with a track record of going toe-to-toe with the liberal establishment. That's me. I'm not going to go to the Swamp to get along. I want to fight for Oklahoma values and tell the Swamp our great state has had enough.

[**Please help us rise above the pack and post a strong total in just four days. Just $5 will go a long way in demonstrating the grassroots support I know we have.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=fbc73d69fe&e=795c6d9796)
For Freedom,

[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=cbbe725a00&e=795c6d9796) Janet Barresi

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: Congress has failed to secure the border
body:
It's time we have a House that will. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/this-impeachment-drama-is-hurting-america-1523869?e=90fad69796)
---
| | [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=08ede28b06&e=90fad69796)
---
| [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=5d1be9bd78&e=90fad69796)
---
| | Peter, President Trump won an electoral landslide advocating for a wall across our southern border.

But this entire year and really since the beginning of his presidency, Democrats have done nothing but obstruct him. All they've focused on is a bogus impeachment that is motivated by their far-left base. That is why we need a conservative House.

Securing the border is one of the biggest crises facing America right now and Democrats have rejected generous deal after generous deal from the President.

That's not America-First. It's high time we have a Congress that acts on the issues the American people are clamoring for.

But we will have to flip the House first, and that fight starts right here in swing districts like IA-02.

We are just a few days from the end of the quarter when every candidate will have to show the level of financial support the grassroots have invested in them. If candidates don't have the funds to continue, they have to drop out.

Please help us post a strong total by the end of the quarter in just 4 days and show the grassroots energy behind our campaign.

[**Will you donate $5, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or anything you can to help us fight back against the left, win this race, and secure the border?**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=e90ef60933&e=90fad69796)
---
| [Donate Now ›](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=a686de5294&e=90fad69796 "Donate Now ›")
---
| This is a conservative district. It voted for President Trump by five points in 2016. We can flip it, I'm sure of it, but it's going to take resources that the other side is going to have in spades from the coasts.

There are only a few dozen competitive House races each year, and my race in IA-02 is going to be one of the most competitive. If we want to win the House back, we must win Iowa's 2nd Congressional District.

There are just a few days left until the end of the quarter.** [Please consider donating $5, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or anything you can today so that we can flip IA-02 and secure the border like Iowans voted for in 2016. ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=c0b325030a&e=90fad69796)**

For Iowa,

Bobby Schilling

name: Zach at Canning for Congress
subject: The first time I saw Doyle speak
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CANNING FOR CONGRESS ](https://u1584542
body:
politicians never speak out against the big timber companies that call the shots. But Doyle did -- and she got a standing ovation. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_gA/ni0YAA/t.2xw/4BGG4ddTQje2zYbiDEBN4w/h0/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCyiK7xXkJftbeIVM7HbMWah-2F-2FTUy7T-2FpE-2Ban7TzilxtVHMJk6Ko3XMudiK22ctjhsmRptTnUeLyseIwv7dBH71854VrDlQoiKgbG8Mtik2kTaDu-2BlrpUfA5NLUxsrwrPhNgCg3FVAc3FkOXMIGuxn8H4dwjs-2F7WGQOAjgqdbcSGDQfcaVAJQ-2B5azXhYQP04XKjvZDOf63pC3KStew-2F3AkiFWJtJhydqFv66zkZBuYLft0dKOMKO33FFPZIiwlExvBY-3D/lDtY)
---
Hi Friend, this is Zach at Canning for Congress HQ, The first time I saw Doyle speak was in my home town of Roseburg, logging capital of America, where politicians _never_ speak out against the big timber companies that call the shots. But Doyle did -- and she got a standing ovation. She spoke plainly to the people, about the need to rebuild Oregon's economy with forestry that is focused on the future, stabilizing the climate, and creating jobs. I was so fired up that I was first in line to shake her hand when she got off the stage, and pledged to do all I can to get her elected to represent us in Congress. That's why I'm writing to you today: We are running behind on our goal to raise an additional $18,000 before 9 PM on New Year's eve. Doyle needs your donation right now so she can kick off 2020 ready to win.
---

clean_body: politicians never speak out against the big timber companies that call the shots. But Doyle did -- and she got a standing ovation. | | Hi Friend, this is Zach at Canning for Congress HQ, The first time I saw Doyle speak was in my home town of Roseburg, logging capital of America, where politicians never speak out against the big timber companies that call the shots. But Doyle did -- and she got a standing ovation. She spoke plainly to the people, about the need to rebuild Oregon's economy with forestry that is focused on the future, stabilizing the climate, and creating jobs. I was so fired up that I was first in line to shake her hand when she got off the stage, and pledged to do all I can to get her elected to represent us in Congress. That's why I'm writing to you today: We are running behind on our goal to raise an additional $18,000 before 9 PM on New Year's eve. Doyle needs your donation right now so she can kick off 2020 ready to win. I was born and raised in Roseburg, and I've never been involved in politics before. name: Team Collins
subject: Sara Gideon is taking from corporate PACs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
One of Sara Gideon's most repeated lines is that Sara is "not accepting corporate PAC money."
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDE0MzA3NDES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjQ2Njg5NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDE0MzA3NDES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjQ2Njg5NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_****_
Dear Peter,
One of Sara Gideon's most repeated lines is that Sara is "not accepting corporate PAC money."
_**Peter, no matter how many times Sara and her campaign says that, it will never be true.**_
Sara's campaign is taking corporate PAC money. Here is how she does it: Her campaign gets thousands of dollars from Leadership PACs run by Democrats, like Senator Chuck Schumer. His PAC gets 95% of its money from corporate PACs. [**And then he funnels that corporate PAC money to Sara Gideon 's campaign**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDE0MzA3NDES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjQ2Njg5NQS2&mt=1&rt=0). It is just a big shell game.
And another stunt they pull: Sara Gideon has her own state leadership PAC. [**That Gideon PAC received 77% of its money from corporations and corporate PACs.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDE0MzA3NDES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjQ2Njg5NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
**The lying needs to stop.** Mainer's deserve the truth. Gideon and her campaign are going out of her way to make the dark money funneling into her campaign _even darker._
But, Peter, it's going to take all hands on deck to fight back against the lies and misrepresentations that are funded by this money from the far-left.
We can and WILL win this race if Susan can count on you today!
[**Donate today and help ensure Susan Collins remains in the Senate!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDE0MzA3NDES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjQ2Njg5NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks for all of your support!
-Team Collins
_****_
_****_
[
SusanCollins.com

Traditionally, campaigns wait until after mandatory FEC reporting deadlines to announce how much they've raised. But you need to know exactly where things stand -- and why it's so important you chip in.

As of this morning, we've raised a little over **$17 million** this quarter.

That's **$3.5 million less** this quarter compared to the same point last quarter. And at the current pace, we'll end up raising around **$5 million less** this quarter by the time the final FEC deadline comes around on December 31. We're behind.

It will be nearly impossible to match last quarter at this point. But we need to start closing the gap as quickly as possible.

**[So Elizabeth Warren needs your help. Please chip in $2 or whatever you can to help close the fundraising gap and ensure she has the resources to continue building this campaign at the most critical point before the primaries and caucuses start.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bee1/45c30650/114661411/66fa8dc3/1528849293/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTFPRl9FT1FfR09MX1dfMjAxOTEyMjdfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM1OF_EOQ_GOL_W_20191227_V1S1_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
Elizabeth Warren is running an unprecedented campaign against the role of big money in the political process that relies on grassroots donations coming from people like you. And the majority of donations to her campaign come from emails like this one.

We're now in a period where time and resources are of the essence. Voters will be heading to the polls and caucuses soon.

When you chip in today, you'll help provide resources to bring Elizabeth's message -- the same message that inspired you -- to voters far and wide: on the airwaves, through one-on-one conversations with organizers, online, and at in-person events.

**But if the numbers don 't pick up, we run the risk of having to pull back plans to organize in all 50 states during the primary. And that plan is central to winning.**

Elizabeth Warren doesn't have wealthy donors in high-rise penthouses (or wine caves) or outside super PACs coming to save the day. She made the decision that those are not the voices that should decide the Democratic nominee.

Instead, she has nearly one million dedicated grassroots donors (you should join them!), and she wouldn't want it any other way.

If there were ever a time for every grassroots supporter to step up, it's now.

When you chip in today, you'll help provide resources to bring Elizabeth's... | | | "" Traditionally, campaigns wait until after mandatory FEC reporting deadlines to announce how much they've raised. But you need to know exactly where things stand -- and why it's so important you chip in. As of this morning, we've raised a little over $17 million this quarter. That's $3.5 million less this quarter compared to the same point last quarter. And at the current pace, we'll end up raising around $5 million less this quarter by the time the final FEC deadline comes around on December 31. We're behind. It will be nearly impossible to match last quarter at this point. But we need to start closing the gap as quickly as possible. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Elizabeth Warren is running an unprecedented campaign against the role of big money in the political process that relies on grassroots donations coming from people like you. And the majority of donations to her campaign come from emails like this one. We're now in a period where time and resources are of the essence. Voters will be heading to the polls and caucuses soon. When you chip in today, you'll help provide resources to bring Elizabeth's message -- the same message that inspired you -- to voters far and wide: on the airwaves, through one-on-one conversations with organizers, online, and at in-person events. But if the numbers don 't pick up, we run the risk of having to pull back plans to organize in all 50 states during the primary. And that plan is central to winning. Elizabeth Warren doesn't have wealthy donors in high-rise penthouses (or wine caves) or outside super PACs coming to save the day. She made the decision that those are not the voices that should decide the Democratic nominee. Instead, she has nearly one million dedicated grassroots donors (you should join them!), and she wouldn't want it any other way. If there were ever a time for every grassroots supporter to step up, it's now.
